Influencer Posting Guide — TMPL Pilates Event
INFLUENCER POSTING GUIDE

ReSaltZ x TMPL
Pilates Wellness Event

Content Creation Guidelines for Our Influencer Partners

March 30, 2026
TMPL, New York City
April 7, 2026
April 10, 2026
1

About This Event

ReSaltZ, a premium Korean wellness beauty brand, is partnering with TMPL for an exclusive pilates class experience in NYC. This event bridges the gap between fitness, self-care, and mineral-based beauty rituals — inviting you to experience how ReSaltZ products elevate your post-workout recovery routine.

Why ReSaltZ + Pilates?

MINERAL RECOVERY

ReSaltZ products are made with Korean sun-dried sea salt exceptionally high in minerals and magnesium — clinically proven to aid muscle relaxation, perfect after an intense pilates session.

SKIN BALANCING

The natural salt balances your skin's oil-moisture ratio and promotes gentle detoxification, leaving skin refreshed and glowing post-workout.

NATURAL FRAGRANCE

ReSaltZ blends natural aroma oils with a custom fragrance mix — never harsh, always a natural, healthy spa scent that lingers beautifully.

FOUNDER'S PHILOSOPHY

Created from her grandfather's traditional Korean medicine recipes, the founder infused every product with wellness ritual care — semi-bath soaks, salt massage, mindful skincare.

2

Product Spotlight — Your Gift Set

Every product you received is designed as a post-workout wellness ritual. Here's how to feature them authentically in your content.
HERO
Aroma Bath Salt
아로마 입욕소금
The ultimate post-pilates recovery soak. Dissolve in a warm semi-bath (38-40C) for muscle relaxation, tension relief, and full-body detox. The mineral-rich salt draws out fatigue while the natural aroma creates a spa experience at home.
Ritual: 20-min soak after workout — feel the magnesium work on sore muscles
HERO
Salt Cleansing Bar
솔트 클렌징 바
A natural salt massage bar that cleanses and exfoliates simultaneously. Use on damp skin for a gentle body scrub — it melts like butter, leaving skin incredibly soft. Perfect for a mindful self-massage ritual after exercise.
Ritual: Slow, circular massage on shoulders and legs — release and cleanse
KEY
Perfume Hand Cream
퍼퓸 핸드크림
A luxuriously scented hand cream that doubles as a mini hand massage moment. The fragrance is natural and elegant — not overpowering. Apply after washing hands post-workout for an instant mood lift.
Ritual: Press between palms, inhale deeply, massage each finger — 30-second reset
KEY
Ritual Perfume
리추얼 퍼퓸
A subtle, layered fragrance designed to encourage reflection and focus. The scent unfolds naturally — fresh, warm, grounding. Wear it as your personal signature or as the finishing touch to your self-care ritual.
Ritual: Pulse points + wrists — let the scent accompany your mindful moments
3

Content Guidelines

Content Types We Love

OPTION A — PRODUCT USAGE REVIEW

Use the products in your actual routine. Film your bath soak, your salt bar massage, your hand cream ritual. Show the before/after glow. Share how it felt after your pilates session. Real usage, real reactions.

OPTION B — HAUL + REVIEW COMBINED (RECOMMENDED)

Start with unboxing what you received at the event — then actually use the products and share your experience. This tells the complete story: first impressions + real results. The most authentic and engaging format.

Key Talking Points

DO MENTION
  • Korean premium wellness beauty brand
  • Made with mineral-rich Korean sea salt
  • High magnesium content for muscle relaxation
  • Natural aroma oils — healthy spa fragrance
  • Founded on traditional Korean medicine recipes
  • Perfect post-workout recovery products
  • The luxurious, natural scent experience
  • Self-care ritual, not just beauty products
  • Tag @resaltzwellness
PLEASE AVOID
  • Making medical or clinical claims
  • Comparing to other specific brands
  • Focusing only on "salt" without the wellness context
  • Overly scripted or unnatural language
  • Filters that distort product color/texture
  • Negative mentions of other event sponsors
  • Posting without FTC disclosure (ad/gifted/partner)
  • Incorrect brand name (it's ReSaltZ, not Resalts/Re-saltz)

Hashtags

#ReSaltZ #ReSaltZWellness #ReSaltZxTMPL #WellnessRitual #PostWorkoutRecovery #KoreanBeauty #SaltTherapy #SelfCareRitual #MineralRecovery #PilatesRecovery #CleanBeauty #TMPLPilates

Sample Caption (feel free to personalize!)

Had the most amazing pilates session at @tmpl_nyc today — and the post-workout ritual? Even better. @resaltzwellness is a Korean wellness beauty brand that makes products with mineral-rich sea salt (seriously high in magnesium for muscle recovery). The founder created these based on her grandfather's traditional Korean medicine recipes, and you can feel the intention in every product. After class, I tried the Aroma Bath Salt soak and oh my god — my sore muscles just melted. The scent is this beautiful, natural spa fragrance that's not overwhelming at all. Then the Salt Cleansing Bar? It's like a massage and exfoliation in one. My skin has never felt this soft. If you're into pilates (or any workout honestly), these are the ultimate recovery products. Wellness beauty at its finest. [Insert your personal experience / favorite product here] #ReSaltZ #ReSaltZWellness #ReSaltZxTMPL #PostWorkoutRecovery #WellnessRitual #KoreanBeauty #SelfCareRitual #Ad

Posting Timeline

Mar 30

Content Creation
Edit, review, prepare posts
Apr 7
1st Check-in
Share draft or post link
Apr 10
Final Deadline
All content must be live
Apr 7 — First Check: Please share a draft or your posted content link with us so we can provide any feedback before the final deadline.
Apr 10 — Final Deadline: All content should be live on your platform by end of day (EST). Please send us the final post link once published.
